title: Just Enderite
description: Just adds Enderite to the otherwise barren End.
body:
Have you ever wandered the dark and dangerous Nether, craft yourself a full set of Netherite armor, then make your way to the End, a floating abyss above the void.
You beat the Ender Dragon, and find out that the End is only good for Elytra.
That's it.
Period.
Not anymore! This mod adds Enderite to Minecraft making the End an actually time-worthy place to visit!
Challenge yourself to create a full set of Enderite Armor, craft the Enderite Upgrade with Raw Enderite, a Netherite Upgrade, etc, or just to find some in general, this mod should hopfully entertain you a bit more than the End has to offer.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Plating Enderite Armor is now avalable, making it seriously over powered.
Use the Ender Guilder to place one of each Enderite tool and armor, then place an Enderite Ingot in the second to last, and the Dragon Egg in the final slot.
The Plated Enderite gear is so overpowered, I might add bosses (or just make a boss mod) to make these tools actually get used...

</details>
